input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.2.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.2.3.2
            TITLE: hand held fire extinguishers must not be mounted on or in the vehicle

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.2.3.2: Hand held fire extinguishers must NOT be mounted on or in the vehicle
VE.2.3.2 Hand held fire extinguishers must NOT be mounted on or in the vehicle

final_answer: Hand held fire extinguishers must NOT be mounted on or in the vehicle
